page_content:
Prerequisite: TLPL695; and TLPL695.

Corequisite: Must be concurrently enrolled in TLPL479J.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI433, EDCI688A, TLPL450 or TLPL696. Formerly: EDCI688A.

TLPL697 Embracing Diversity: Supporting Culturally and Linguistically Diverse Learners in the Secondary Classrooms (3 Credits)

Explores language variation across a wide range of social, economic, regional and ethnic groups. It is designed to help teacher candidates increase their awareness of language differences and to enhance their effectiveness when teaching in culturally and linguistically diverse secondary classrooms.

Credit Only Granted for. TLPL688G or TLPL697.
